news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Detroit Pistons at Boston Celtics
news.content: Celtics start Tatum, Brown, White, Holiday, and Horford. Pistons go with Cunningham, Ivey, Beasley, Duren, and Ausar Thompson.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Toronto Raptors at Miami Heat
news.content: Heat start Herro, Butler, Robinson, Adebayo, and Highsmith. Raptors counter with Barnes, Barrett, Quickley, Poeltl, and Dick.

news.headline: End of Q1: Boston Celtics 28 - Detroit Pistons 24
news.content: Celtics control the opening quarter. Tatum with 10 early points.

news.headline: End of Q1: Miami Heat 22 - Toronto Raptors 26
news.content: Raptors come out hot with a 4-point lead. Barnes looks aggressive.

news.headline: End of Q2: Boston Celtics 54 - Detroit Pistons 50
news.content: Celtics maintain a slim lead at the half. Cunningham keeping Detroit close with 16 points.

news.headline: End of Q2: Miami Heat 48 - Toronto Raptors 52
news.content: Raptors lead at halftime. Barrett with 14 points on efficient shooting.

news.headline: End of Q3: Boston Celtics 78 - Detroit Pistons 80
news.content: Pistons take the lead! Cunningham erupts for 15 in the third. Boston's defense struggles.

news.headline: INJURY ALERT: Jaylen Brown heads to locker room
news.content: Brown appeared to tweak his hamstring late in the third quarter. Celtics medical staff evaluating.

news.headline: UPDATE: Jaylen Brown ruled out for remainder of game
news.content: Brown will not return tonight. Hamstring tightness, severity to be determined.

news.headline: End of Q3: Miami Heat 72 - Toronto Raptors 78
news.content: Raptors extend their lead to 6. Heat's offense goes cold in the third.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Dallas Mavericks at Utah Jazz
news.content: Jazz start Markkanen, Sexton, Kessler, Collins, and Clarkson. Mavericks go with Doncic, Irving, Washington, Gafford, and Jones.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Houston Rockets at Denver Nuggets
news.content: Nuggets start Jokic, Murray, Porter, Gordon, and Braun. Rockets go with Green, VanVleet, Sengun, Smith, and Brooks.

news.headline: Final: Boston Celtics 105 - Detroit Pistons 112
news.content: Pistons complete the upset in Boston! Cunningham finishes with 34 points. Celtics couldn't recover after losing Brown.

news.headline: Final: Miami Heat 96 - Toronto Raptors 106
news.content: Raptors win in Miami! Barnes leads with 26 points. Butler held to 18 on an off night.

news.headline: End of Q1: Utah Jazz 32 - Dallas Mavericks 30
news.content: High-scoring start. Markkanen and Doncic trading buckets.

news.headline: End of Q1: Denver Nuggets 30 - Houston Rockets 28
news.content: Tight opening quarter. Jokic with 9 points and 5 assists.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Memphis Grizzlies at LA Clippers
news.content: Clippers start Harden, Powell, Kawhi, Zubac, and Mann. Grizzlies go with Morant, Bane, Jackson Jr., Aldama, and Smart.

news.headline: End of Q2: Utah Jazz 66 - Dallas Mavericks 64
news.content: Shootout! Jazz up 2 at the half. Sexton pours in 18 first-half points.

news.headline: End of Q2: Denver Nuggets 58 - Houston Rockets 62
news.content: Rockets take the halftime lead. Green and VanVleet combine for 30.

news.headline: End of Q1: LA Clippers 22 - Memphis Grizzlies 30
news.content: Grizzlies come out firing. Morant with 12 first-quarter points.

news.headline: End of Q3: Utah Jazz 96 - Dallas Mavericks 98
news.content: Mavs take a slim lead into the fourth. Doncic has 28 points. Back and forth affair.

news.headline: End of Q3: Denver Nuggets 88 - Houston Rockets 90
news.content: Rockets maintain their lead. Jokic battling with 24 points but Sengun matching him.

news.headline: End of Q2: LA Clippers 48 - Memphis Grizzlies 62
news.content: Grizzlies dominating! 14-point lead at the half. Clippers struggling on offense.

news.headline: End of Q4: Utah Jazz 122 - Dallas Mavericks 122
news.content: Tied at the end of regulation! Markkanen hits a clutch three to force overtime! Incredible finish.

news.headline: End of Q4: Denver Nuggets 116 - Houston Rockets 116
news.content: Overtime in Denver! Jokic forces OT with a contested hook shot at the buzzer!

news.headline: End of Q3: LA Clippers 74 - Memphis Grizzlies 92
news.content: Blowout developing. Morant has 28, Jackson Jr. adds 22. Clippers look checked out.

news.headline: Final (OT): Utah Jazz 140 - Dallas Mavericks 133
news.content: Jazz win a thriller in overtime! Markkanen with 38 points. Sexton adds 28. Doncic had 42 in a losing effort.

news.headline: Final (OT): Denver Nuggets 128 - Houston Rockets 125
news.content: Nuggets survive in overtime! Jokic triple-double: 36 points, 14 rebounds, 11 assists. Murray clutch down the stretch.

news.headline: Final: LA Clippers 103 - Memphis Grizzlies 121
news.content: Grizzlies cruise in LA! Morant finishes with 33 points and 8 assists. Memphis wins wire-to-wire.
